privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real CT Cranium dataset (0051.zip) from InVesalius v3.0 releases, a publicly available medical imaging sample of the skull. The dataset is not synthetic. The task requires exporting three binary STL files at different Hounsfield Unit thresholds (200, 400, 600 HU, max 3071 HU) demonstrating sensitivity analysis in CT segmentation. A critical metadata error exists: the 'min_triangle_count' is specified as 10000 in task.json, but the verifier (verifier.py line 62) actually checks for triangle_count > 1000, a ten-fold difference. The 'decreasing_triangles' relationship is correctly implemented—triangle counts decrease as the threshold increases, as expected from medical imaging principles (lower threshold includes more tissue, higher threshold excludes noise).
